title: Hinge for Trading
abstract:
Hey everyone, we’re an ex YC team building retail-intelligence.ai where we suggest 5 trades to you every 6 hours.

Our product maps out a strategy with you into logic trees, transforming it into custom signals, live dashboards, and automated alerts.

We’re excited to bring a new experience to reta
abstract_zh: 嘿，大家好！我们是一群曾经的YC学徒，现在带来了一个叫“零售智投”的新玩意儿。每隔6小时，我们会给你推荐5个投资妙招。这可不是随便乱点鸳鸯菜，而是通过逻辑树规划策略，生成定制信号，实时动态仪表盘和自动提醒——让你的投资决策快人一步！快来体验，不做亏本的庄稼汉！
